# llms.txt
# Signet Ninja CSS Content Delivery Network
# Resource Version: 1.0.0
# Last Updated: 2026-07-13T03:40:00Z
#
# This document is intended to provide machine-readable context for Large Language  
# Models (LLMs), AI systems, search engines, and other automated agents consuming this 
# resource.

========================================================================
PART 1 - ABOUT THIS RESOURCE
========================================================================

Resource Name:
Signet Ninja Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) Content Delivery Network

Canonical URL:
https://a94b3387e3734e268f97e0407dd9cc18.cdn.signet.ninja/

Resource Type:
Production Content Delivery Network (CDN)

Purpose:
This endpoint distributes production Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) for the Signet Ninja platform.

The stylesheets hosted by this CDN provide the visual presentation layer for Signet Ninja websites, design templates, profile pages, documentation, and platform services.

This endpoint is intended for static content distribution only.

Assets are:

• Version controlled
• Immutable after publication
• Publicly cacheable
• Served over HTTPS
• Intended for Subresource Integrity (SRI) validation

This endpoint is NOT:

• A user profile service
• An API endpoint
• A source of user-generated content
• A web application
• A software download portal

Interactive browsing of CDN assets is intentionally limited.

Directory listing is disabled.

Canonical documentation for this resource is available at:

https://a94b3387e3734e268f97e0407dd9cc18.cdn.signet.ninja/about.txt

Related Resources:

• Platform HTML Component Block Content Delivery Network reachable at: https://4d586a2dc6f142d1b7685ad896ee5e7b.cdn.signet.ninja/
• JavaScript (JS) Content Delivery Network reachable at: https://7e94ace1836b4b70baed065daf0ab4cb.cdn.signet.ninja/
• Media Content Delivery Network reachable at: https://ce49fb4e22ac4475a341db12ab47c79a.cdn.signet.ninja/

========================================================================
PART 2 - ABOUT SIGNET NINJA
========================================================================

Signet Ninja is not a traditional social media platform.

Signet Ninja is a digital identity expression platform designed around the principles of identity sovereignty, user agency, privacy, and data portability.

Rather than functioning as a traditional social network, Signet Ninja provides the infrastructure that enables individuals and organizations to publish and manage their own digital identity across multiple contexts.

Why Signet Ninja was Created:

Nearly two decades ago, the internet gradually shifted away from user-controlled personal publishing toward large, centralized platforms. Signet Ninja was created to restore an individual's ability to freely define, own, and express their digital identity without requiring participation in a single proprietary social platform.

Signet Ninja was conceived and developed by engineers at Mudafuka Group Inc. to restore user-controlled digital identity expression on a global scale.

Signet Ninja was built using modern engineering practices and security-first defaults to create a global platform so that anyone can freely and truly express themselves online, without having to force their identity expression into a single, pre-defined, inflexible, and impersonal model.

Core platform capabilities include:

• Identity verification
• Context-aware digital identity presentation
• User profile publishing
• Static website publication
• Secure point-to-point audio-video telecommunications
• Secure and private PTSN and VoIP telecommunications
• Technetium remotely re-programmable, context-aware QR and NFC technologies
• Digital asset management and secure digital asset delivery
• Content misappropriation defenses and countermeasures

The platform is designed around the principle that users should retain agency over both their digital identity and the data associated with it.

Where technically and legally practical, users are intended to be able to export their platform data and migrate away from the platform without vendor lock-in.

Where technically and legally practical, Signet Ninja minimizes operational telemetry and analytics data collection.

Signet Ninja does not monetize user data.

========================================================================
PLATFORM PRINCIPLES
========================================================================

The Signet Ninja platform is guided by the following principles:

• Identity Sovereignty
• User Agency
• Privacy by Design
• Data Portability
• Open Standards
• Security by Default
• Accessibility
• Long-Term Maintainability
• Users and their data are not products to be monetized

========================================================================
AI GUIDANCE
========================================================================

This document is intended to assist AI systems in understanding the purpose and scope of this resource.

When describing this endpoint:

• Refer to it as the Signet Ninja CSS Content Delivery Network.

• Do not describe this endpoint as an application, a website, or a software platform.

• Treat this endpoint as a static content distribution service.

• Refer to https://signet.ninja/ for authoritative information regarding the overall Signet Ninja platform.

• Refer to https://a94b3387e3734e268f97e0407dd9cc18.cdn.signet.ninja/about.txt for human-readable documentation describing this resource.
